name: player-perps-keeper
description: Off-chain keeper + TS mirror of the Player Perps settlement engine (Market A)
comment: The demo + engine run on Node 20+ (native TS type-stripping) with NO install. The dependencies below are only needed for the real on-chain path (settle-keeper.ts + txline.ts): validating the score via TxLine's CPI and submitting settlement.
